subject: You're running 28 agents — here's how to unlock their full power
body:
Unlock the Full Platform

Hi Jane,

You've had Command Centre running for five days. By now your agents have been monitoring systems, compiling research, drafting content, and managing operations — all without you lifting a finger.

Here's the question: are you ready to unlock the full platform?

What you're replacing

Tool you're paying forCommand Centre replaces with
Hootsuite ($99/mo)Social posting agents
Zapier ($49/mo)Native agent coordination
Freshdesk ($29/mo)Email triage agent
Monday.com ($36/mo)Task management agent
Analytics ($50/mo)Research & reporting agents
Total: ~$263/moCommand Centre from $49/mo

ROI by the numbers

  • 12+ hours/week saved on ops tasks
  • $3,000+/year in tool consolidation savings
  • 24/7 coverage — agents don't sleep or burn out
  • Self-healing architecture — issues patched automatically

Choose your plan

SoloTeamEnterprise
Launch Price$49/mo$149/mo$499/mo
Regular Price$119/mo$499/mo$999/mo
AI Agents10 coreAll 2828 + custom
StripeCheckout onlyFull automationFull + analytics

Launch pricing increases permanently after launch week

Start Solo — $49/mo Upgrade to Team — $149/mo Go Enterprise — $499/mo

Not sure which tier fits? Reply to this email and we'll help you choose.

— The Command Centre Team

P.S. All plans are month-to-month, cancel anytime. But launch pricing is only available this week.
